name: Hawksearch
description: Hawksearch — Enterprise site search platform with semantic search, merchandising rules, and faceted navigation.

seo.title: Hawksearch — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: Hawksearch: Hawksearch — Enterprise site search platform with semantic search, merchandising rules, and faceted navigation.

when_to_use: Semantic enterprise site search with merchandising rules
Faceted navigation for B2B product catalog discovery
Custom ranking for SEO-optimized search results pages
Behavioral search personalization for e-commerce sites
Enterprise search with CMS and ERP integrations

pros: Semantic search with solid merchandising controls
Strong fit for B2B and manufacturing catalogs
Faceted navigation handles complex product attributes
Veteran vendor with established implementation partners
cons: UI and docs feel dated compared to newer competitors
Implementation typically requires a partner agency
Not self-serve; pricing gated behind demo
Less momentum than Algolia or Constructor in 2026
review.verdict: Proven enterprise search for B2B and niche catalogs, but developer experience lags modern AI-native alternatives.
review.best_for: B2B distributors and manufacturers with complex SKU and attribute needs.
review.not_for: DTC brands or teams wanting a modern self-serve developer experience.
